run_summary.summary: Big move on Flexsteel — Ian responded to Kenny's email in under 6 hours and extended the PopFly application window to Monday. Apply before Monday or lose the slot a fifth time. New deal card for Wise Block — Iris at Make Wonder INC replied to Liz's follow-ups with a formal offer (1x YT/IG Video, cash + product, Key Partner status), but the launch window is April 25-30 so Liz needs to send her rate TODAY. Pulling from Mariah's full check-in and the Apr 22 Collab thread: JLab March is past-due (wrong email — now fixed, form + payment expected ASAP); Smart Solar caption uploaded, video editing due Mon/Tue; Aleve had a VO revision request Apr 22 (missing #AlevePartner disclosures + wrong script) — Liz resubmitted same day, back under approval per Apr 24 check-in; JLab May ready for content; JLab April on track for 5/17; Aqara payment incoming; Antique Candle flash sale hard deadline June 18-22.

suggestions.message: Ian extended the PopFly window to Monday — apply NOW before it closes again. This is the 5th reopening. Don't wait until Monday morning.

Iris at Make Wonder INC (iris@makewondermcn.com) is waiting on Liz's rate quote for the Wise Block Botanical Series. Launch window is April 25-30 — today is the last day to respond with a number. If Liz is interested, she needs to reply ASAP.

Bark (1 TikTok + Whitelisting, $750) was due today April 24 — no status note in the check-in. Confirm content was submitted to the Drive folder: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Wkq80ztLyqK16XMAKa52ZqRX8Tj7j2wm
JLab March Campaign ($2,000, 1 Reel/Story) was due 4/20 — Mariah says JLab had the wrong email when trying to send Liz the registration form. Now corrected; form + payment expected ASAP.

deals.next_action: Apply to Flexsteel/Steinhafels campaign on PopFly — window open until Monday Apr 27
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com) responded to Kenny's morning email at 3:27 PM CT — confirmed he extended the PopFly application window to Monday (Apr 27). Apply before Monday or the window closes again (this would be the 5th time).
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Ian confirmed PopFly window extended to Monday — waiting_on flipped to us, apply before Apr 27

deals.next_action: Upload completed Linkind SP6 video to Drive folder (caption already confirmed uploaded)
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Liz confirmed caption uploaded to Drive folder (reply to Mariah at 5:16 PM CT). Video still in editing as of midday. Full delivery due Mon/Tue Apr 27-28. Mariah shared consolidated client filming notes: 50% of video must focus on nighttime lighting effects, app controls showing pattern switching, avoid daylight shots, include color animations.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: Liz confirmed caption uploaded to Drive — video editing still in progress, due Mon/Tue

deals.next_action: Send rate/quotation to Iris at Make Wonder INC for Wise Block Botanical Series
deals.notes: [Apr 24]: Iris (iris@makewondermcn.com), Make Wonder INC (Official Wise Block Agency), replied with formal offer: 1x YouTube/Instagram Video for Wise Block Botanical Series (Sakura Zen, Pine Breath, Maple Whisper, Blossom Harmony — Eastern flora/Zen garden building block sets). Offer includes cash compensation (amount TBD, awaiting Liz's quotation) + free product + Key Partner status + global brand exposure. Launch date April 25-30. Liz had been pursuing since ~Apr 13 with follow-ups Apr 20 and Apr 23. Iris explicitly asks for Liz's quotation to proceed.
deals.activity_note: Apr 24: New deal card created — Wise Block Botanical Series via Make Wonder INC; urgent quote needed, launch Apr 25-30

deals.next_action: Await JLab registration form + payment (email issue resolved per Mariah)
